name: Crowd City
core_loop: Run around the city gathering neutral people to grow your crowd, then consume smaller crowds to become the largest group before time runs out.
audience_proxy: Broad, casual audience of all ages looking for quick, competitive, and satisfying gameplay.
visual_style: Low-poly, colorful 3D environments with simple, stickman-like character models.

palette.description: Bright, contrasting primary colors used to distinguish different player crowds against a more muted, pastel city background.

screenshot_signals: Skin unlock screen with various characters (dinosaur, deer, penguin, etc.)
